suggestions.action: Implement data imputation for null values
suggestions.rationale: This approach helps to maintain data continuity and reduces the null rate effectively.

suggestions.action: Conduct a root cause analysis to identify source of nulls
suggestions.rationale: Understanding the cause can help in addressing the underlying issue to prevent future nulls.

suggestions.action: Impute missing values with the median of the available data
suggestions.rationale: Using the median ensures that the imputed values are less affected by outliers and reflects the central tendency of employment lengths.

suggestions.action: Flag and analyze rows with missing values for further investigation
suggestions.rationale: This approach allows for understanding the underlying reasons for missing data, which can help in future data collection improvements.

suggestions.action: Remove the outlier from the dataset
suggestions.rationale: This approach ensures that the data remains within the expected range, improving overall data quality.

suggestions.action: Cap the outlier to the maximum allowable value
suggestions.rationale: Capping preserves the data point while correcting its value, which may be useful in maintaining data size.

detail: Mixed formats: 7 rows as YYYY-MM-DD, 3 rows as MM/DD/YYYY

suggestions.action: Standardize all dates to YYYY-MM-DD format
suggestions.rationale: This format is ISO compliant and widely used, ensuring consistency across the dataset.

suggestions.action: Convert all dates to MM/DD/YYYY format
suggestions.rationale: This format may be more familiar to users in certain regions, though it is less standardized.
